title: Baton Architecture Overrides
description: Per-release overrides for architecture rules. Suppress or amend rules for a specific release.

suppress_rules.description: Rule IDs to suppress for this release. The rule will not be checked against any slice in this release.

amend_rules.description: Per-rule amendments. Key is the rule ID, value is fields to override.

reason.description: Why these overrides are in effect for this release
